capabilities.activation: automatically applied throughout every mapped operation and action
capabilities.authorityEffect: supports reasoning and execution through mandatory constraints without independently authorizing product writes
capabilities.conflicts: Higher-priority repository and requester constraints remain authoritative; this capability may narrow but never expand authority.

capabilities.activation: when refactor intent is explicit or unambiguous
capabilities.authorityEffect: supports the selected refactor action by requiring exactly one mode before editing; it does not select that action
capabilities.conflicts: An ambiguous mode stops before editing; strict-preserve-logic overrides convenience cleanup.

capabilities.activation: automatically during FE/BE analyze, design, create, edit, refactor and relevant prompt planning
capabilities.authorityEffect: supports the selected action by classifying test need without independently authorizing test writes
capabilities.conflicts: A read-only operation may recommend but never create tests.

capabilities.activation: automatically when design reasoning is needed inside an eligible operation
capabilities.authorityEffect: supports reasoning inside the selected action without selecting the action or creating write intent
capabilities.conflicts: Proposed design never overrides repository facts or an unresolved decision-owner choice.

capabilities.activation: explicit SQL explain intent or embedded explanation support needed during SQL analysis
requiredInputs: SQL text or pointed SQL object
capabilities.conflicts: A modification request routes to explicit action=edit or action=refactor; explain never edits or executes SQL.
